data.name: Sex Shop Simulator: X-RAY DESIRE
data.detailed_description:
ABOUT SEX SHOP SIMULATOR: X-RAY DESIRE

Sex Shop Simulator: X-Ray Desire is an adult store management simulator with the ability to see through customers' clothing! You run a growing business, serve unusual clients (humans, aliens, and even zombies), and protect your merchandise from cunning shoplifters. Level up, unlock wild content, and grow your adult entertainment store.

🕹️ Gameplay Overview

🏪 Store Management

Stock a variety of sex toys, set prices, and create an atmosphere that keeps customers coming back again and again. Monitor inventory, balance income and expenses, and grow your business from a modest little shop into a thriving store.

🔍 X-Ray Scanner (Unique Mechanic)

The star feature of the game — an X-ray scanner that sees through customers' clothing. This isn't just a visual effect, but a core gameplay mechanic for catching thieves.

  • Point the scanner at suspicious customers

  • Detect a special mark hidden under their clothing

  • Catch the thief before they leave the store

  • Earn a reward for every criminal caught

Upgrade your scanning range and radius as you level up. The higher the level — the more effective the protection.

👥 Diverse Customers

A variety of types, a variety of personalities! Some are shy, some are demanding, and others... will try to rob you. Serve unique visitors!

💼 Hiring Assistants

Hire three sexy assistants to help run the store:

  • Serve customers while you're busy

  • Keep the shelves in order

  • Make the workflow a whole lot spicier 

📣 Street Marketing

Step outside the store! Interact with potential customers on the street through street marketing:

  • Grab the attention of passersby

  • Raise the "interest level" of future shoppers

🎯 Progression & Upgrades

Level up your store to unlock new content:

  • New products — wilder and more exotic with each tier

  • Scanner upgrades — increased range and radius

  • Interactive toys — giant objects to place in the store that are very effective at attracting new visitors 😏

Every upgrade unlocks new opportunities and brings in new sexy customers.

🌴 Key Features

💰 Store management simulator with a full economy and progression system

🔍 Unique X-ray scanner for actively catching thieves in real time

👽 Diverse customers: humans, aliens, and zombies

💃 3 hirable hot assistants to help with management

📈 Upgrade system with increasingly wild content to unlock

🎨 Store customization — place interactive toys and create a unique atmosphere

📣 Street marketing to attract customers

Ready to open your store? 😏

data.short_description: The only sex shop simulator with X-Ray theft detection — see through clothing to catch thieves in real-time. Manage your adult store, serve humans, aliens, and zombies, upgrade your scanner, and build the wildest shop in town!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 德文, 日文, 韓文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 捷克文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 x64 / Windows 11 x64
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-6600 (3.3Ghz) or AMD Ryzen 5 1400 (3.2Ghz)
  • 記憶體: 16 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce GTX 1060 6GB / AMD Radeon RX 580 8GB / Intel Arc A750
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 x64 / Windows 11 x64
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7-8700 (3.2Ghz) or AMD Ryzen 5 3600 (3.6 Ghz)
  • 記憶體: 32 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce RTX 3070 Ti / Nvidia GeForce RTX 4070 / AMD Radeon RX 6800 XT
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 6 MB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 x64 / Windows 11 x64
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-6600 (3.3Ghz) or AMD Ryzen 5 1400 (3.2Ghz)
  • Memory: 16 MB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce GTX 1060 6GB / AMD Radeon RX 580 8GB / Intel Arc A750
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 x64 / Windows 11 x64
  • Processor: Intel Core i7-8700 (3.2Ghz) or AMD Ryzen 5 3600 (3.6 Ghz)
  • Memory: 32 MB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce RTX 3070 Ti / Nvidia GeForce RTX 4070 / AMD Radeon RX 6800 XT
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 6 MB available space
